# Keyframe Animation

> Timeline-based keyframe animation and playback

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

Timeline-based keyframe animation and playback

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Animation Recording** — when Capture property changes is requested, then Capture property changes completed.
- **Animation Playback** — when Play stored animations is requested, then Play stored animations completed.
- **Animation Blending** — when Fade between animations is requested, then Fade between animations completed.
- **Animation Speed** — when Adjust playback rate is requested, then Adjust playback rate completed.
- **Animation Callbacks** — when Trigger events at keyframes is requested, then Trigger events at keyframes completed.
